synopsis:
The fifth and final issue of the Marvel comic miniseries Star Wars: Halcyon Legacy.
Star-crossed lovers who crossed the wrong syndicate try to escape on the Halcyon. But even in the chaos of the early days of the New Republic, can they evade a murderers' row of bounty hunters stalking them – including BOSSK? And years in the future, the pirate CRIMSON JACK closes in on the legendary Galactic Starcruiser.
title: Halcyon Legacy #5
